name: io.github.zoom/zoom-docs
title: Zoom Docs MCP Server
description: Zoom Docs server for creating and retrieving Zoom documents and notes in Markdown.

examples.name: Create a Zoom Doc
examples.description: Create a new Zoom Doc from Markdown content.

examples.name: Retrieve document content
examples.description: Load an existing Zoom Doc or note and return its Markdown content.

examples.name: Read back notes
examples.description: Open existing notes for summarization, follow-up generation, or downstream workflows.
